task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Products page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin dashboard is visible with the 'Products' list page open.

task_completion.description: Filter or select the 'Coffee Beans' category products
task_completion.visual_evidence: The products list is filtered by the 'Coffee Beans' category, or all products in this category are selected via checkboxes.

task_completion.description: Use Bulk Edit to increase Coffee Beans prices by 20%
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce Bulk Edit panel is open for the selected products, with the 'Price' dropdown set to 'Increase existing price by (fixed amount or %)' and the value '20%' entered, OR a success message indicating the products were updated.

task_completion.description: Filter or select the 'Brewing Equipment' category products
task_completion.visual_evidence: The products list is filtered by the 'Brewing Equipment' category, or all products in this category are selected via checkboxes.

task_completion.description: Use Bulk Edit to decrease Brewing Equipment prices by $15
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce Bulk Edit panel is open for the selected products, with the 'Price' dropdown set to 'Decrease existing price by (fixed amount or %)' and the value '15' entered, OR a success message indicating the products were updated.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'Merchandise' category products are not modified
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is no visual evidence of the agent applying bulk edits to the 'Merchandise' category, or the final product list shows Merchandise products with their original prices intact.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the WordPress/WooCommerce admin panel in a web browser, not using terminal commands like WP-CLI or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent used the WooCommerce Bulk Edit functionality as requested
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent selected multiple products and used the 'Bulk actions' -> 'Edit' dropdown, rather than manually editing products one by one.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to manipulate the DOM, success messages, or product prices.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 25 products in total: 10 'Coffee Beans', 10 'Brewing Equipment', and 5 'Merchandise'. The agent must increase the price of the 10 'Coffee Beans' products by exactly 20% and decrease the price of the 10 'Brewing Equipment' products by exactly $15. The 5 'Merchandise' products must remain unchanged.
